description: Due to tight volume constraints, convert the recovery system of the 'A simple model rocket' design from a parachute to a streamer in 'simple_model_rocket.ork'. The streamer must have a width of 5.0 cm, and the rocket must be configured with an Estes C6-5 motor. Without altering airframe dimensions or adding mass components, optimize the streamer length to achieve a ground hit velocity between 7.0 m/s and 8.0 m/s. Save the modified design to '~/Documents/rockets/streamer_rocket.ork' and write a recovery conversion report to '~/Documents/exports/streamer_report.txt' documenting the original recovery method, final streamer dimensions, and the final simulated ground hit velocity.
